mapper.sql: SELECT l.id, l.subject_id, COALESCE(ua.nickname, ca.nickname, sa.real_name, sa.username, ca.username, l.login_name, 'system') AS operator_name, l.business_domain_id, bd.name AS domain_name, l.login_name, l.portal_type, l.client_code, l.event_type, l.ip, l.user_agent, l.result, l.fail_reason, l.created_at FROM login_log l LEFT JOIN user_account ua ON ua.username = l.login_name LEFT JOIN staff_account sa ON sa.subject_id = l.subject_id LEFT JOIN customer_account ca ON ca.subject_id = l.subject_id LEFT JOIN business_domain bd ON bd.id = l.business_domain_id

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM login_log l LEFT JOIN user_account ua ON ua.username = l.login_name LEFT JOIN staff_account sa ON sa.subject_id = l.subject_id LEFT JOIN customer_account ca ON ca.subject_id = l.subject_id LEFT JOIN business_domain bd ON bd.id = l.business_domain_id

where.if: AND (ua.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ua.mobile LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ua.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR sa.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ca.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ca.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR l.login_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND (ua.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%') OR l.login_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%'))

AND (ua.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%') OR sa.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%') OR sa.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%') OR ca.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%'))

mapper.select: ORDER BY l.created_at DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
